title: Missing doc comments on public items throughout the codebase
description: The coding standards require doc comments on everything rustdoc knows about — including module-private items. A survey of the codebase finds numerous public structs, enums, and functions with no doc comments: AppState (server.rs), WebhookPayload/WebhookMedia (webhook.rs), RateLimiter/new/try_acquire/prune (ratelimit.rs), ActorKeyCache (actor_cache.rs), Tag/TagType/process_content (content.rs), PostRow (post.rs), SignatureParts (signatures.rs), and all items in sanitize.rs, theme.rs, and media.rs. Missing docs means maintainers must read the implementation to understand the contract, and rustdoc produces empty pages.
close_reason: Out of scope: doc comments are a project-wide initiative, not a review fix. Tracked separately if needed.
